doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core 735 ILCS 5/9-209 statutory text is real and largely accurate, but the additional "Service Requirements" and "Subsequent Steps" sections appear to be non-verbatim editorial expansions rather than authentic statutory language.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The core statutory language of 735 ILCS 5/9-209 regarding the 5-day demand for rent is real and largely accurate, but the added "Service Requirements" and "Subsequent Steps" sections appear to be editorial summaries/expansions not present in the actual statute, and some details (e.g., the email service caveat, the 7-day summons rule) are paraphrased or potentially inaccurate additions rather than verbatim statutory text.
